title: End Update by gloww
description:
End update - add what everyone has been waiting for! End update! The new flora and fauna will not let you get bored. We also added a new ore (rose quartz).
By Gloww
body: End Update - added what everyone has been waiting for! An infected forest with two types of trees has been added:Small and Big.There is a chest with valuable loot under the big one. Three new endermen have also been added - Crystallized, Infected, and Infected Crystallized. A special pickaxe can be crafted from rose quartz ore, which will add experience to the player when breaking blocks.New plants have been added, as well as a jellyfish, a crystallized beetle and an ender slime.Rose quartz ore mines and ender bridges have also been added.
